ItacPersonItem.Notes: On Cosimo`s I `annuale` in 1561, he lectured in Accademia on the right for a live person to use the name `divino`. Capacci went to Padua to study law at the beginning of the year 1561/62. See Marchetti, `Notizie sulla giovinezza di Fausto Sozzini da un copia lettere di Girolamo Bargagli`, Bibliotheque d`humanisme et renaissance (1969), p. 75.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
